title: Feasibility Studies
description: High-performance thermal energy projects are designed to solve the toughest challenges in effectively adopting consistent and reliable energy for heating and cooling. Effectively meeting the challenge means conducting detailed technical assessments of the geothermal systems required, and supporting investment level analyses of finance requirements. Examples of Feasibility Study content include: Heating and cooling thermal capacity
content: High-performance thermal energy projects are designed to solve the toughest challenges in effectively adopting consistent and reliable energy for heating and cooling.
Effectively meeting the challenge means conducting detailed technical assessments of the geothermal systems required, and supporting investment level analyses of finance requirements.
Examples of Feasibility Study content include:
Your email
lists: Heating and cooling thermal capacity available within usable site boundaries
Building use types and estimated thermal loads and energy models
Considerations for distribution and injection pipelines
Economic analysis, including estimated capital investment and operating costs
Financial analysis of project capital requirements, return on investment (ROI) calculations, and comparisons to conventional systems.
Financial projections such as net present value (NPV) and annual cash flow
Environmental impact analysis and impact on Greenhouse Gas (GHG) reductions
Building energy load requirements and energy costs
Building and site geothermal equipment energy source sizing and optimization
Design considerations for geothermal heat pump system and loop configuration
Design considerations for distribution pipelines and “supply/injection” sources

headings.text: Defining The Future Of Thermal Energy Networks

title: Master Planning
description: Ensuring implementation of owner and stakeholder requirements is critical to thermal network project planning and implementation. The Master Plan utilizes results from the Feasibility Study to establish technical requirements and design criteria for the project, leading to design of the thermal network system to be constructed. From technical requirements, to economic development and utility relations,
content: Ensuring implementation of owner and stakeholder requirements is critical to thermal network project planning and implementation. The Master Plan utilizes results from the Feasibility Study to establish technical requirements and design criteria for the project, leading to design of the thermal network system to be constructed.

From technical requirements, to economic development and utility relations, deep expertise in planning and facilitating multidisciplinary collaborations toward an optimal Master Plan protects the integrity of the project’s ultimate result. We’re known for solving complex challenges in unique and unexpected ways.
Your email

title: Design
description: During the Design process, core design principals for thermal systems to maximize building efficiency and occupant comfort are analyze and deployed. Forward looking collaborations with all stakeholders and construction teams successfully ensure each project’s performance and efficiency before construction ever begins, by providing such deliverables as: Technology and equipment assessments Schematic drawings of proposed systems Process

title: Owner Representation
description: During the construction phase, ensuring the project is ushered along a mutually agreed project timeline throughout, while realizing available rebates and securing approval from proper regulatory agencies, along with overseeing delivery of cost projections, define a successful project delivery that protects the Owner interests. In the construction and operational phases, Egg Geo’s expertise is often
content: During the construction phase, ensuring the project is ushered along a mutually agreed project timeline throughout, while realizing available rebates and securing approval from proper regulatory agencies, along with overseeing delivery of cost projections, define a successful project delivery that protects the Owner interests.
In the construction and operational phases, Egg Geo’s expertise is often deployed to advise on optimizing geothermal systems including well field management and controls optimization.
Each project’s success is ensured by our multidisciplinary approach and collaboration with design, engineering, construction and operating teams in providing technical expertise and oversight.

headings.text: Defining The Future Of Thermal Energy Networks

title: Publications
description: Egg Geo supports industry and client growth by packaging our knowledge and experience for use by a broad range of stakeholder groups. Our consultants regularly present industry-leading thinking about issues and opportunities for adopting and implementing thermal energy networks and geothermal power generation at industry conferences, as well as in leading industry publications and industry-endorsed
content: Egg Geo supports industry and client growth by packaging our knowledge and experience for use by a broad range of stakeholder groups.

Our consultants regularly present industry-leading thinking about issues and opportunities for adopting and implementing thermal energy networks and geothermal power generation at industry conferences, as well as in leading industry publications and industry-endorsed books.

We contribute articles and columns to numerous trade magazines, including National Geographic Energy, Commercial Architecture Magazine, Plumbing Engineer, Plumbing and Heating Contractor News, Green Builder, Mechanical Hub, U.S. Department of Energy, Energy Information Administration, National Driller, Contracting Business, and many others.

Our lead consultant and founder, Jay Egg, a global authority on thermal districts and geothermal HVAC technologies, co-authored two McGraw-Hill books: Geothermal HVAC, Green Heating and Cooling, and Modern Geothermal HVAC Engineering and Control Applications.

Our newest book, defining thermal energy network solutions, is coming out in 2022. The publication focuses on the critical role that district energy and geothermal power generation play in enabling the global transformation of the heating and cooling industry and the rapid expansion of clean and continuous long-term energy capabilities.
Modern Geothermal HVAC Engineering and Control Applications 1st Edition, Kindle Edition
Your email

headings.text: Defining The Future Of Thermal Energy Networks

title: Seminars
description: Egg Geo supports industry and client growth by packaging our knowledge and experience into seminars, and conference programs. Our customized education for clients, teams, and project stakeholders includes thermal district, geothermal heating and cooling solutions, and HVAC systems that deliver on long-term goals for optimized stability. Our programs are collaboratively designed with our clients to
content: Egg Geo supports industry and client growth by packaging our knowledge and experience into seminars, and conference programs.

Our customized education for clients, teams, and project stakeholders includes thermal district, geothermal heating and cooling solutions, and HVAC systems that deliver on long-term goals for optimized stability.

Our programs are collaboratively designed with our clients to ensure they meet training and educational goals that ensure knowledge and expertise for future success. Recent programs have included clients and participants from the New York State energy research and development authority (NYSERDA), and the State University of New York.
Your email
lists: Thermal networks and the water-energy nexus

title: Emerging Technology Advocacy
description: Through its programs and activities Egg Geo is making significant contributions to making continuous renewable heating and cooling a reality. Our team supports market adoption for leading and emerging technologies that solve critical problems and gaps in deploying thermal networks and geothermal exchange as the leading resource-efficient energy technologies for building long-term stability and continuous
content: Through its programs and activities Egg Geo is making significant contributions to making continuous renewable heating and cooling a reality.

Our team supports market adoption for leading and emerging technologies that solve critical problems and gaps in deploying thermal networks and geothermal exchange as the leading resource-efficient energy technologies for building long-term stability and continuous high-performance electrification.
Customized advocacy programs are available for technologies that meet our criteria.
Your email

headings.text: Defining The Future Of Thermal Energy Networks

title: Code Development
description: As part of its contribution to securing the future of thermal energy networks and geothermal exchange, Egg Geo stays active on committees that write the codes that govern and make way for the future of geothermal energy. Industry codes for the most resilient energy technologies regulating thermal energy networks and geothermal exchange are evolving rapidly.
content: As part of its contribution to securing the future of thermal energy networks and geothermal exchange, Egg Geo stays active on committees that write the codes that govern and make way for the future of geothermal energy.

Industry codes for the most resilient energy technologies regulating thermal energy networks and geothermal exchange are evolving rapidly. We proactively participate in technical code committees, leading development and writing of the codes which govern and make way for the future of geothermal energy and thermal networks, including design and installation standards for geothermal HVAC systems.
Your email
lists: Involved in technical code committees since 2015
Served on IAPMO Uniform Solar and Geothermal Code Committee, 2018
Served on IAPMO Uniform Mechanical Code, 2021 Edition
Contribute to the forthcoming 2024 IAPMO Uniform Mechanical Code
Serves on the Board of Directors for Geothermal Rising
